software.name: hudson3
software.description: Hudson Soft Best Hit Game Pack 3
software.notes: Contains Bomber Man, Zero Fighter and Hiyoko Fighter [FDC] Doesn't boot, with 5.25" interface will set the wrong GFX mode then it access 3.5" anyway [gfx] sets mk2 bitmap, wants mk2 text. Also wants 240 lines vertical (copyright part at bottom). pc6601: "d88: Floppy disk has excess of heads for this drive that will be discarded (floppy heads=2, drive heads=1)." (safe to ignore?)

rom.name: hudson soft best hit game pack 3 (6601).d88

software.name: asalt
software.notes: Looks a tech demo (time doesn't run down, has no enemies, has 1 stage)
